page.title: Corpus Christi Yacht Charter in Marbella: A Unique Holiday Afloat

data.meta_description: Celebrate Corpus Christi with a luxury yacht charter in Marbella. Cruise Marbella coast from Puerto Banús. Prices from €749/2h. Book your unique holiday afloat.
data.summary: Discover how to celebrate Corpus Christi in style with a yacht charter in Marbella. Depart from Puerto Banús with prices from €749/2h, including skipper, drinks, and snacks.
key_facts: Corpus Christi is a public holiday in Spain, ideal for a day on the water.
All charters depart from Puerto Banús, Marbella.
Prices start at €749 for 2 hours (Astondoa 40 or Azimut 39).
Each booking includes a licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, and insurance.
Larger yachts like the Mangusta 80 (24m) accommodate up to 12 guests.
Mangusta 80 charters include a free jet ski (minimum 4 hours).
Typical cruising areas: Marbella coast, Cabopino, or Estepona.
Book via WhatsApp for boats not listed with fixed rates.

faq.q: What is Corpus Christi and why charter a yacht in Marbella?
faq.a: Corpus Christi is a Catholic public holiday in Spain, usually in late May or June. Marbella’s warm weather and long daylight hours make it perfect for a day at sea. A yacht charter lets you enjoy the holiday away from crowded beaches, with flexibility to swim, sunbathe, or explore the coast.

faq.q: Which yachts are available for Corpus Christi?
faq.a: Our fleet includes 27 boats, from the 6.4m Mariah SX21 (5 pax) to the 29m Ferretti 94 (12 pax). Popular choices for Corpus Christi are the Astondoa 40 (€749/2h) or the Mangusta 80 (€4,719/4h with free jet ski). All depart from Puerto Banús.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no hidden costs.

faq.q: Can I book a yacht for a full day on Corpus Christi?
faq.a: Yes. Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) cost €2,299 for 8 hours. Mangusta 80 variants require a minimum 4-hour booking at €4,719. Other boats like the Azimut 58 Flybridge or Ferretti 94 are priced on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: Where can we sail during a Corpus Christi charter?
faq.a: Typical routes include cruising past Marbella’s Golden Mile, anchoring at Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés, or heading to Cabopino or Estepona. Your skipper will tailor the itinerary to your preferences.

faq.q: Is the jet ski included with the Mangusta 80?
faq.a: Yes. When you book any Mangusta 80 (white, grey, or standard) for a minimum of 4 hours, a jet ski is included free of charge. Perfect for adding excitement to your Corpus Christi celebration.

faq.q: How do I book a yacht for Corpus Christi?
faq.a: You can book directly on our website or via WhatsApp for boats with variable pricing. We recommend booking early as Corpus Christi is a popular holiday. Contact us for availability and to secure your preferred yacht.
Cancellation terms vary by yacht and season. Generally, full refunds are available up to 14 days before departure. Please check your booking confirmation or ask via WhatsApp for specific conditions.

data.body_html:
Corpus Christi in Marbella is more than just a public holiday—it's an opportunity to escape the crowds and spend quality time on the Mediterranean. With warm June temperatures averaging 26°C and calm seas, a Corpus Christi yacht charter Marbella lets you celebrate afloat. Depart from Puerto Banús and enjoy a day of swimming, sunbathing, and exploring the Costa del Sol from a unique perspective. Whether you want a short 2-hour cruise or a full 8-hour voyage, our fleet has options for every group size and budget.

Why Choose a Yacht Charter for Corpus Christi?

Corpus Christi falls on a Thursday in 2025 (19 June), making it a perfect long weekend. Instead of queuing at beach clubs or fighting for sunbeds, you can have complete privacy on your own boat. All charters include a licensed skipper, so no experience is needed. You can focus on relaxing while we handle navigation and anchoring. Plus, with drinks and snacks included, it's a hassle-free way to celebrate.

Our Fleet for Corpus Christi

We operate 18 yachts from Puerto Banús, ranging from 6.4m to 29m. For Corpus Christi, popular choices include:

  • Astondoa 40 (12.5m, 9 pax) – from €749 for 2 hours
  • Azimut 39 (12.5m, 11 pax) – same pricing as Astondoa
  • Mangusta 80 (24m, 12 pax) – €4,719 for 4 hours, includes free jet ski
  • Azimut 58 Flybridge (17.6m, 12 pax) – pricing on request
  • Ferretti 94 (29m, 12 pax) – the ultimate luxury experience

For smaller groups, the Speedboat (7m, 6 pax) or Mariah SX21 (6.4m, 5 pax) offer affordable options. View the full list on our boat rental Marbella page.

Pricing and Inclusions

Our transparent pricing means no surprises. Here's what you get:

BoatDurationPriceInclusions
Astondoa 40 / Azimut 392 hours€749Skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance, IVA
Astondoa 40 / Azimut 398 hours€2,299Same as above
Mangusta 80 (any variant)4 hours min.€4,719Includes free jet ski
All other boatsVariesOn requestContact via WhatsApp

Every charter includes water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. Fuel and 21% IVA are always included.

Best Routes for Corpus Christi

Your skipper will suggest a route based on weather and your preferences. Popular options include:

  • Marbella Coastline – cruise past the Golden Mile, Río Verde, and La Concha mountain backdrop.
  • Cala del Faro – a quiet cove near Cabopino, perfect for swimming.
  • Cala Cortés – a beautiful beach with crystal-clear water, ideal for anchoring.
  • Estepona – head west to the charming old town and its marina.
  • Puerto Banús – return to the glamorous port for a meal or drinks.

For a longer trip, consider sailing to Sotogrande or even Gibraltar (weather permitting). Discuss options with your skipper.

What to Expect on Board

Arrive at Puerto Banús 15 minutes before departure. Your skipper will greet you and give a safety briefing. Once onboard, you're free to use the sun pads, cabin, and bathroom. The crew will serve drinks and snacks throughout the trip. You can swim, snorkel, or simply relax. If you book a Mangusta 80, the jet ski adds extra fun—your skipper can guide you to the best spots.

How to Book Your Corpus Christi Charter

Booking is simple. For boats with fixed prices (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39, Mangusta 80), you can reserve online directly. For all other yachts, contact us via WhatsApp for a personalised quote. We recommend booking at least two weeks in advance for Corpus Christi, as demand is high. Payment is secure, and you'll receive a confirmation with all details.

Frequently asked questions

What is Corpus Christi and why charter a yacht in Marbella?

Corpus Christi is a Catholic public holiday in Spain, usually in late May or June. Marbella’s warm weather and long daylight hours make it perfect for a day at sea. A yacht charter lets you enjoy the holiday away from crowded beaches, with flexibility to swim, sunbathe, or explore the coast.

Which yachts are available for Corpus Christi?

Our fleet includes 27 boats, from the 6.4m Mariah SX21 (5 pax) to the 29m Ferretti 94 (12 pax). Popular choices for Corpus Christi are the Astondoa 40 (€749/2h) or the Mangusta 80 (€4,719/4h with free jet ski). All depart from Puerto Banús.

What is included in the charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). There are no hidden costs.

Can I book a yacht for a full day on Corpus Christi?

Yes. Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) cost €2,299 for 8 hours. Mangusta 80 variants require a minimum 4-hour booking at €4,719. Other boats like the Azimut 58 Flybridge or Ferretti 94 are priced on request via WhatsApp.

Where can we sail during a Corpus Christi charter?

Typical routes include cruising past Marbella’s Golden Mile, anchoring at Cala del Faro or Cala Cortés, or heading to Cabopino or Estepona. Your skipper will tailor the itinerary to your preferences.

Is the jet ski included with the Mangusta 80?

Yes. When you book any Mangusta 80 (white, grey, or standard) for a minimum of 4 hours, a jet ski is included free of charge. Perfect for adding excitement to your Corpus Christi celebration.

How do I book a yacht for Corpus Christi?

You can book directly on our website or via WhatsApp for boats with variable pricing. We recommend booking early as Corpus Christi is a popular holiday. Contact us for availability and to secure your preferred yacht.

What is the cancellation policy?

Cancellation terms vary by yacht and season. Generally, full refunds are available up to 14 days before departure. Please check your booking confirmation or ask via WhatsApp for specific conditions.
